text.title: lint-shellcheck-hadolint-iac-floor Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lint-shellcheck-hadolint-iac-floor as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running only `terraform validate` and skipping `tflint` because validate "already runs in CI."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: `terraform validate` only checks syntax and provider schema. tflint adds rules like `aws_instance_invalid_type`, deprecated-syntax flags, and per-provider best-practice checks that validate cannot see. Both are needed.

failure-mode.description: Adding `--no-fail` or `|| true` to the linter invocation in CI to "stop blocking us during the migration."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: That converts the gate to advisory across the entire repo, not just the offending file. The right move is a per-file allowlist with a tracking issue and a date.
